languages.text: "Ты-то, вижу, солдат хороший, честный, но не все у вас такие, да?"

traits.locale_text: "Ты-то, вижу, солдат хороший, честный, но не все у вас такие, да?"

languages.text: "I can see you are a good, honest soldier. But they're not all like you, are they?"
languages.original_text: "Ты-то, вижу, солдат хороший, честный, но не все у вас такие, да?"

traits.locale_text: "I can see you are a good, honest soldier. But they're not all like you, are they?"
"I can see you are a good, honest soldier. But they're not all like you, are they?"
"I can see you are a good, honest soldier. But they're not all like you, are they?"

languages.text: “我看得出来，你是个诚实本分的士兵。但不是所有人都像你这样吧？”
languages.original_text: "I can see you are a good, honest soldier. But they're not all like you, are they?"

traits.locale_text: “我看得出来，你是个诚实本分的士兵。但不是所有人都像你这样吧？”

languages.text: « Vous m'avez l'air d'un soldat bon et honnête, mais ce n'est pas le cas de tout le monde dans votre régiment, je me trompe ? »
languages.original_text: "I can see you are a good, honest soldier. But they're not all like you, are they?"

traits.locale_text: « Vous m'avez l'air d'un soldat bon et honnête, mais ce n'est pas le cas de tout le monde dans votre régiment, je me trompe ? »

languages.text: "Senin iyi, dürüst bir asker olduğunu görebiliyorum. Ancak hepsi senin gibi değil, değil mi?"
languages.original_text: "I can see you are a good, honest soldier. But they're not all like you, are they?"

traits.locale_text: "Senin iyi, dürüst bir asker olduğunu görebiliyorum. Ancak hepsi senin gibi değil, değil mi?"

languages.text: «Veo que es un soldado bueno y honrado, pero no todos son como usted, ¿verdad?».
languages.original_text: "I can see you are a good, honest soldier. But they're not all like you, are they?"

traits.locale_text: «Veo que es un soldado bueno y honrado, pero no todos son como usted, ¿verdad?».

languages.text: "Ich sehe, Ihr seid ein guter, ehrlicher Soldat. Aber sie sind nicht alle wie Ihr, oder?"
languages.original_text: "I can see you are a good, honest soldier. But they're not all like you, are they?"

traits.locale_text: "Ich sehe, Ihr seid ein guter, ehrlicher Soldat. Aber sie sind nicht alle wie Ihr, oder?"

languages.text: 「あなたは誠実な兵士だとわかります。でも、皆があなたと同じように誠実な兵士ではないでしょう？」
languages.original_text: "I can see you are a good, honest soldier. But they're not all like you, are they?"

traits.locale_text: 「あなたは誠実な兵士だとわかります。でも、皆があなたと同じように誠実な兵士ではないでしょう？」
